Meet Your Counselor

Mithila Farjana Haque is a Trainee Counselor and Associate Member of PsychTalks, currently serving at the CU Medical Counseling Unit at the University of Chittagong. Her approach centers on compassionate listening and evidence-informed support.

Whether you're navigating academic stress, relationships, identity, or just need a non-judgmental space to talk — she is here to walk alongside you.
